nature_language:
We are 1 person traveling from Shenzhen to Shanghai for 2 days, and we need to meet any one of the following conditions:
1. Want to try these restaurants: Cong's Restaurant (Liuhe Building Branch), Bella Vita Italian Restaurant (Haifang Road Branch), and Lao Zhengxing Restaurant (Fuzhou Road Branch).
2. Want accommodation within 2.18 km of Columbia Circle.
